name: llm-telepresence-browser-lab
description: Permissioned LLM-friendly remote browser lab with synthetic camera and microphone inputs.

scripts.build: npm run build --workspace=@telepresence/shared && npm run build --workspace=@telepresence/media && npm run build --workspace=@telepresence/server && npm run build --workspace=@telepresence/web
scripts.dev: npm run build --workspace=@telepresence/shared && npm run build --workspace=@telepresence/media && node scripts/dev.mjs
